description: RESTCONF command generation process (pure code, not LLM prompt)
note: RESTCONF commands are generated by restconf_processor.py using deterministic code, NOT by LLM. The code maps link names to interface names and builds curl commands.

generation_logic.step1: Map link name to interface: e.g. S4-S9 -> node4/GigabitEthernet0/0/0/7
generation_logic.step2: Build GET command to fetch current interface config from ODL config endpoint
generation_logic.step3: Build PUT command to push modified config with 'shutdown' field added
generation_logic.step4: For each link, generate a pair of (GET + PUT) commands

key_functions: build_config_files_two_step() - fetches current config and adds shutdown field
process_predicted_links() - main entry point, orchestrates command generation
